case_title: JEFFREY SURLA VS. MONICA MONETTE LAUS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED MAY-29-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAUS, MONICA MONETTE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-05-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-05-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY SURLA, JEFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT LAUS, MONICA MONETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SURLA, JEFFREY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAUS, MONICA MONETTE $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,885.00 PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $150.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON AUG-03-2012 AND ON THE 3RD DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
